info.name: Multi-tenant Inventory API - Test Cases
info.description:
Automated Postman test cases for the multi-tenant inventory API.

Start the API, then run the whole collection in order with Collection Runner.

The setup requests save API keys and resource IDs automatically.

A unique runId prevents SKU/code conflicts when the collection is run again.

item.name: Protected route rejects a missing API key

response.name: 401 - Protected route rejects a missing API key

item.name: Protected route rejects an invalid API key

response.name: 401 - Protected route rejects an invalid API key

item.name: Create tenant A and save API key

response.name: 201 - Create tenant A and save API key
400 - Product validation error
400 - Variant schema mismatch

item.name: List stock levels in both warehouses

response.name: 200 - List stock levels in both warehouses
400 - Invalid variant ID

item.name: Adjustment ledger is complete and immutable

response.name: 200 - Adjustment ledger is complete and immutable

item.name: List products includes the created variant

response.name: 200 - List products includes the created variant
400 - Malformed product ID returns 400

item.name: Variant attributes must match dynamic schema

response.name: 400 - Variant attributes must match dynamic schema

exec: pm.expect(body.message).to.eql('Variant attributes do not match product schema');

response.name: 409 - Duplicate product SKU returns 409

exec: pm.expect(body.message).to.eql('A resource with that SKU or code already exists');

response.name: 400 - Zero adjustment is rejected

item.name: Verify failed withdrawal leaves stock unchanged

response.name: 200 - Verify failed withdrawal leaves stock unchanged

item.name: Transfer source and target must differ

response.name: 400 - Transfer source and target must differ

exec: pm.expect(body.message).to.eql('Source and target warehouses must differ');

item.name: Create tenant B and save API key

response.name: 201 - Create tenant B and save API key

item.name: Tenant B cannot list tenant A products

response.name: 200 - Tenant B cannot list tenant A products

item.name: Tenant B cannot adjust tenant A resources

response.name: 404 - Tenant B cannot adjust tenant A resources

item.name: Tenant B cannot read tenant A inventory

response.name: 404 - Tenant B cannot read tenant A inventory
